prompt: Using the layout from the reference website screenshot, generate a version with a 'brutalist' web design aesthetic, featuring raw text, monochrome colors, and sharp edges.
prompt_refined: Generate a website screenshot. Recreate the layout, content blocks, and relative positioning of all elements from image 1, but redesign them with a brutalist web aesthetic. Apply a strict monochrome color scheme (black, white, and shades of gray) throughout. All visual elements, including buttons, borders, and frames, must have sharp, angular edges and a blocky appearance. The central profile image (of the man from image 1) should be contained within a sharp, rectangular frame instead of its original circular shape. All text, such as the 'Illustrator & Visual Designer' title, navigation links, numerical statistics ('6 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE', '683 PROJECTS DONE'), and descriptive text, should appear raw, unstyled, and prominent. The 'Hire!' button in the top-right and the 'GRAPHIC DESIGN' button at the bottom-left should also be stark, rectangular blocks.
objects: Central profile image of the man
Rectangular frame surrounding the central profile image
Top navigation links (Home, Portfolio, Service, Page, Contact)
'Hire!' button in the top-right as a stark rectangular block
'GRAPHIC DESIGN' button at the bottom-left as a stark rectangular block
Numerical statistics ('6 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE', '683 PROJECTS DONE')
Monochrome color scheme applied to all elements
